meaning: n.塞丽娜(f.) n.爱情小夜曲
examples: I understood immediately how this could happen, having just spent an hour with Serena at the steering wheel, driving around a church parking.
Serena: Thanks for making the time.
They both had a match point and Serena eventually won it 7-6 in the third.
Serena had every opportunity to gloat after Wimbledon trophies in both singles and doubles play.
